Thanks

---

### Post by SeijiSensei on 2018-03-17
Start with a clean profile.  I usually do this
```

cd ~
mv .mozilla .mozilla.old

```
then start Firefox.  You might want to export your bookmarks first: Bookmarks > Show All Bookmarks > Import and Backup

---

### Post by &amp;KyT$0P# on 2018-03-17
> **MikeCyber said:**
>  look at this term output:
That's normal if you have e10s enabled in Firefox.  You can check it in about:support, under "Multiprocess Windows" and "Web Content Processes".

---
